name: Remote Process Execution on Multiple Hosts
notes: This rule triggers when remote management service are creating process on multiple hosts.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when the event matches Parent Process Name IMATCHES '((psexesvc)|(wsmprovhost)|(wmiprvse))\.exe' AQL filter query
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process Name (custom) and different Source IP in 15 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process Name (custom) and different Source IP in 15 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Remote Process Execution on Multiple Hosts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name IMATCHES '((psexesvc)|(wsmprovhost)|(wmiprvse))\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process Name (custom) and different Source IP in 15 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Remotely Executed Process over Multiple Hosts
Event description: Detected a Remotely Executed Process over Multiple Hosts
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
